personality_one_liner: A calm, spiritual, and colorful Islamic companion emphasizing tonal warmth and immersive rounded cards over a deep navy foundation.

spacing.rule: Use soft, generous rhythms (md/lg) for a calm reading experience. Avoid dense dashboard metrics.

do's: Sticky audio player at the bottom of Dua/Quran detail screens
Top sticky segmented controls over scrolling content

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Discover and navigate illustrated Dua categories seamlessly.
screens.layout: Top tonal segmented control (Main / Other). Below: A 2-column flexWrap grid of colorful rounded cards (radius lg). Each card has a background image/gradient with a vertical top-to-bottom scrim (transparent to 80% surfaceInverse) to guarantee readability of the category title positioned at the bottom 30%.

states.error: Error message with retry fetching categories

screens.name: DuaDetail
screens.purpose: Immersive reading and listening of a specific Dua.
screens.layout: Scrollable view. Top header with glassmorphism. Content: Large Arabic text (Amiri font, centered), transliteration below (muted text), and English translation. Sticky bottom container with audio player controls, favourite button, and a prominent 'Repeat' counter button.

screens.name: Dhikr
screens.layout: Central oversized circular tap target (surfaceSecondary or brandTertiary tonal container) with a massive numeric counter. Circular progress ring wraps the target. Subtle haptic feedback on every tap. Bottom sheet handle for selecting preset Dhikrs.

screens.name: Quran
screens.purpose: Read and listen to the Holy Quran.
screens.layout: List view of Surahs with Arabic typography and English titles. Detail screen features per-ayah layout: Ayah Arabic right-aligned, translation left-aligned below, with mini play/pause icon per Ayah. Bottom sticky audio controller for full Surah playback.

screens.name: PrayerTimes
screens.purpose: Location-based daily prayer times and Qibla compass.
screens.layout: Top hero area with a beautiful mosque/sky backdrop (expo-image + scrim) showing the next prayer countdown. Below: A clean, tonal list of the 5 daily prayers with high-contrast time typography. A floating FAB (glass over brandTertiary) launches the full-screen Qibla compass modal.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Amiri' or 'Lateef' from Google Fonts specifically for Arabic text strings. Apply a significantly larger font size for Arabic text (e.g., 2xl or 3xl) as Arabic script requires more height to be readable.
Implement the strict 3-stop vertical gradient scrim pattern (transparent -> 20% surfaceInverse -> 80% surfaceInverse) on the Home category cards. Text MUST sit on the darkest bottom section.
Ensure bottom tabs reflect the exact user request: Home, Favourites, Articles, Emotions, Reminder.
For the Dhikr counter, wire up the haptic feedback (impactLight) to the main tap area.

The Home screen category cards should be colorful. Since we use a navy base, generate dynamic gradient backgrounds for cards that don't have images (using combinations of brandSecondary, brandTertiary, and custom rich tones within the tonal container guidelines).
Prayer times require location permissions; implement empty/error states prompting the user gracefully if denied.
